{{Quote|His name is Dev Breeger—not that it matters anymore.|Grobber|<ref name="SWG:AED">{{GalaxiesAED}}</ref>}}
'''Dev Breeger''' was a criminal who worked as a double agent for both the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] syndicate and [[Shalera]] the Hutt's organization on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. When Black Sun found out that he was not only spying on Shalera but also sold information about Black Sun to her, [[Grobber]] ordered a well armed individual to find and kill him.

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:TemplateThug.png|250px|thumb|Possible depictions of Dev Breeger]]
Dev Breeger was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].
